summary: Iteration 18 - Removed Features & Celery Task Queue Testing Complete. All 15/15 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend verified: sidebar correctly removes Kitchen, Financials, Pricing/Revenue modules while retaining Analytics, WhatsApp, Housekeeping, Table Reservations. WhatsApp page loads with all 6 tabs and Celery-generated notifications.
critical_code_review_comments: Kitchen, Financials, and Revenue/Pricing routers successfully removed from server.py
Celery beat scheduler with 6 scheduled tasks correctly configured in celery_app.py
Celery tasks properly execute and store notifications with source='celery' in database
APScheduler successfully replaced by Celery - all automation endpoints return 'Gorev kuyruga eklendi'
Frontend App.js correctly removes nav-kitchen, nav-financials, nav-pricing, nav-revenue from NAV_CONFIG
WhatsApp/Instagram mock API integration working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard, sidebar nav, WhatsApp page all working)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified: (1) Removed features return 404 - /api/kitchen/*, /api/financials/*, /api/revenue/* all return 'Not Found', (2) Celery scheduled-jobs endpoint returns 6 jobs: breakfast-prep, morning-reminders, checkout-cleaning, evening-room-check, whatsapp-reservation-reminders, whatsapp-checkout-thanks, (3) All 4 Celery task execution POST endpoints work and queue tasks successfully, (4) Group notifications show source='celery' for recently executed tasks, (5) Frontend sidebar correctly hides removed modules and shows existing modules including Analytics, WhatsApp, Masa Rez, Kat Hizmetleri, (6) WhatsApp page has 6 tabs and displays mock mode warning and group notifications from Celery.

mocked_apis_list: WhatsApp Business Cloud API - messages stored in DB but not actually sent
Instagram Messaging API - messages stored in DB but not actually sent
